_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of cyber actions (i.e. cyber defense, information gathering, environment preparation, cyber attack) principles, capabilities, limitations, and effects.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of responsible AI principles and their operationalization, including fairness metrics, explainability methods, human oversight requirements, and AI impact assessment methodologies.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.476), RC-K-011 (RC, cosine: 0.475).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.455). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, principles]. DCWF-only terms [actions, attack, capabilities, cyber, defense, effects] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, explainability, fairness, human, impact] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.872, R=0.861). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of cyber actions (i.e. cyber defense, information gathering, environme" and "Knowledge of responsible AI principles and their operationalization, including f". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.501 ≈ STS 0.455 (gap 0.047). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, principles] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, principles]. DCWF-only: [actions, attack, capabilities, cyber, defense, effects]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, explainability, fairness, human, impact].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.8% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
